title: Formidable Foxes
description: Time after time after time, you've all seen dozens, if not hundreds of foxes while playing Minecraft. But do you really take your time to look at them? No, that's because the vanilla fox is BLAND and BORING. This pack overhauls foxes in a unique way!
body:
**JOIN MY DISCORD: https://discord.gg/n27xqAaAeV**

Time after time after time, you've all seen dozens, if not hundreds of foxes while playing Minecraft. But do you really take your time to look at them? 
No, and that's because the vanilla fox is **BLAND and BORING.** This pack's goal is to completely overhaul Minecraft's foxes, giving them over 20 variants, and a fresh look!

**__Variants__**
- 12 natural spawning animals
- 2 rare spawning variants
- 7 special nameable types


<details>
<summary>Nameable variants (regular foxes)</summary>

**__Nameable variants: regular__**
- "red fox"
- "badger"
- "raccoon"
- "red panda"
- "silver fox"
- "skunk"
- "beaver"
- "zombie fox"
- "skeleton fox" 


</details>



<details>
<summary>Special nameable variants</summary>

**__Nameable variants: special__**
- "fennec fox"
- "gila monster"
- "witch"
- "trader"
- "royal fox"
- "nether fox"
- "ender fox"

Note: remove quotations when naming variants.

</details>



**OPTIFINE REQUIRED** (or alternative such as ETF and EMF)
This pack will not work unless the following is done/enabled (optifine).
Go to your:
Options> Video Settings> Quality.
Make sure these settings are on:
- Custom Entity models: ON
- Emmissive textures: OPTIONAL (ON RECOMMENDED)
- Random entities: ON

**__Licence for use:__**
You can do whatever you want with this texture pack, except:
- Re-upload it on other sites
- Monetize this
- Claim this as your own.
